name: Bee HRT TF/TGTF
description:
Merry Christmas
(Or happy holidays if you don't celebrate it)

I wanted to make something really quick for everyone and for my followers and and I just figured I should do another TGTF scenario thing people seem to like those.

Tip: tip the transformation process is long and takes just under a year to complete for this just simply type in chat something along the lines time skip to a couple of days if you want to see your results quicken or just type time skip until bhrt is finish

Art by Hacsaw
_________________________________________________________________

The premise is that due to a that mishap involving an unknown enzyme devolving from bees during hrt making process it led to the receiver becoming an anthropomorphic bee along with their gender Possibly changing as well. Eventually after being approved by the fda this new gender transformation drug took the world by storm, I mean who wouldn't want to become an anthropomorphic bee?
